# Daniil Khremli

Senior Unity Developer with 9+ years of experience in Unity/C#, WebGL, multiplayer, Photon Fusion, Zenject, UniTask, Addressables, AR/VR and mobile development.

## Main pages

- English CV: https://YOUR_GITHUB_PAGES_URL/cv-en/index-en.html
- Russian CV: https://YOUR_GITHUB_PAGES_URL/cv-ru/index-ru.html
- Portfolio: https://daniilkhremli.notion.site/Khremli-Daniil-3558e0cfb75980f28465c7d441dc53a8?pvs=74
- Telegram: https://t.me/labloko
- Email: dxsunty@gmail.com

## Positioning

Daniil is a Senior Unity Developer focused on production Unity architecture, WebGL optimization, multiplayer gameplay systems, Photon Fusion, Addressables, SDK integrations and release preparation for browser/mobile platforms.

## Core expertise

- Unity/C#
- WebGL optimization
- Photon Fusion / Photon PUN 2
- Multiplayer gameplay systems
- Network state synchronization
- Addressables and asset pipeline optimization
- Zenject / dependency injection
- UniTask / async workflows
- REST API / WebSocket integrations
- CrazyGames / Yandex Games / Telegram Mini Apps
- AR/VR and mobile development
- Team leadership, code reviews and mentoring

## Projects

### Megamod Games

WebGL UGC platform with multiplayer gameplay, Addressables, monetization and external platform releases. Impact includes 30% faster initial WebGL loading and 50% lower memory usage.

Project link: https://www.crazygames.com/game/megamodgames

### Pixel World

WebGL multiplayer shooter for Telegram Mini Apps. The project supports thousands of daily players, in-app purchases and shareable player statistics. Technical stack includes Unity, WebGL, Photon Fusion, Addressables, IAPs and gameplay/network systems.

Project link: https://pw.game/

### Portfolio

Collection of Unity projects, videos and production examples.

Portfolio link: https://daniilkhremli.notion.site/Khremli-Daniil-3558e0cfb75980f28465c7d441dc53a8?pvs=74

- Russian: native
